__comment: Shared fixture for the item-name validation crosscheck. Rust `path_safety::validate_item_name` is the AUTHORITY; the renderer mirror `workspace-tree/nameValidation.ts` exists only for live editor feedback and must stay rule-for-rule in sync. Both sides assert against THIS table (Rust: path_safety.rs crosscheck test via include_str!; TS: nameValidation.test.ts) — change a rule without updating the fixture and one of the two suites fails, same pattern as path-safety-blacklist.json (PRD 0.2.15 §7.2).
